headline: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Big Shakeup Continues: UnitedHealth Stake Completely Sold
summary: For years, investors treated Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-A)(NYSE:BRK-B) as the market’s ultimate “follow-the-smart-money” signal. If Buffett bought, retail investors paid attention. If he sold, Wall Street usually started asking uncomfortable questions. Now Berkshire Hathaway has given investors another one to chew on. According to Berkshire’s latest SEC 13F filing, the conglomerate completely exited its ... Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Big Shakeup Continues: UnitedHealth Stake C
